calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS STEVE STILES, HORNE, MIKE (SUED AS MIKE HORN) AND BRIAN MURPHY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR IN LIGHT OF THE FILING OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Steven Williams, Esq. for and present with the Plaintiff Yousef Ibrahim Qaqundah.
Jennifer DeMarco, Esq., through limited scope, for and present with the Defendants: Mike Horne and Steven Stiles.
Diana Hughes, Esq., through limited scope, for and present with the Defendant: Brian J. Murphy.
This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem: Debra Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions in Dept. 304-B.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Judgment and Settlement Agreement", which was NOT filed.
Case settled and matter is taken off the TRIAL calendar.
